{ "name": "fast-levenshtein", "version": "2.0.6", "description": "Efficient implementation of Levenshtein algorithm with locale-specific collator support.", "main": "levenshtein.js", "files": [ "levenshtein.js" ], "scripts": { "build": "grunt build", "prepublish": "npm run build", "benchmark": "grunt benchmark", "test": "mocha" }, "devDependencies": { "chai": "~1.5.0", "grunt": "~0.4.1", "grunt-benchmark": "~0.2.0", "grunt-cli": "^1.2.0", "grunt-contrib-jshint": "~0.4.3", "grunt-contrib-uglify": "~0.2.0", "grunt-mocha-test": "~0.2.2", "grunt-npm-install": "~0.1.0", "load-grunt-tasks": "~0.6.0", "lodash": "^4.0.1", "mocha": "~1.9.0" }, "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "https://github.com/hiddentao/fast-levenshtein.git" }, "keywords": [ "levenshtein", "distance", "string" ], "author": "Ramesh Nair <ram@hiddentao.com> (http://www.hiddentao.com/)", "license": "MIT" }
